title: Mouthwatering Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: Tender lamb kebabs marinated in a rich blend of spices and sesame seed oil, served solo on a bamboo tray, perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Combine lamb, sesame seed oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl and mix well.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill to medium high heat.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they reach an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Immediately submerge the kebabs in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Let the kebabs rest in the ice bath for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs on a bamboo tray, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges.
Discard any leftover marinade and wash hands thoroughly after handling raw meat.
